name: kickpages-plugin
description: KickPages plugin for Claude Code — MCP server + skills (FunnelAI and more).

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
